历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest ranking for science was approximately 2436; in 2023, approximately 3690 (including Tibetan class regular category); in 2024, approximately 2796; in 2025, approximately 2914 for physics category. From 2022 to 2025, rankings fluctuated in the range of 2400–3700, with a baseline of approximately 2914 in 2025. Data for 2021 only includes the ethnic experimental class (very small ranking), which is not comparable and thus excluded from trend analysis. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai Province for science/physics category: 43 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 46 in 2024, 40 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 41, a slight increase of 1 (+2.5%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has been rising in recent years: 100th in 2021 → 101st in 2022 → 104th in 2023 → 103rd in 2024 → 80th in 2025 → 79th in 2026, a significant improvement, enhancing attractiveness to candidates. The university is not included in reputation evaluation data, indicating no major recent public opinion incidents, with stable reputation. Douyin popularity ranking is 80th, rated as 'average', with low attention on short video platforms and no obvious abnormal signals in application enthusiasm. There is also no record of abnormal submission data. Ethnology is A+ (top nationally), Sociology A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-. Among physics category enrollment majors, Computer, Electronic Information, Statistics, etc., have weak correlation with advantageous disciplines, but the A+ in Ethnology enhances the overall brand of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with strong social application willingness. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is approximately 48,000 (slightly up from 47,669 in 2025), with an estimated physics category of about 30,600, leading to slightly intensified competition. The provincial control line for physics category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 350 points, and for science undergraduate first batch in 2024 is 343 points, basically stable. Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Qinghai candidates. The university enrolls a small number of students in Qinghai Province (about 40), accounting for a very low proportion of total national enrollment, making rankings susceptible to fluctuations from individual high-scoring candidates' application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2914, a slight increase of 1 in the 2026 plan (+2.5%), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (from 100th to 79th) enhancing attractiveness, high social popularity of physics category hot majors (Computer/Electronic Information), and a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province, it is expected that competition in the physics category in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2938, with a range of 2438–3438.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 480; in 2023, liberal arts (regular category) was about 642; in 2024, liberal arts was about 617; in 2025, history category was about 6239. From 2022 to 2024, liberal arts rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 480–642 range. In 2025, due to the exam mode switching from "liberal arts" to "history category" (new college entrance examination reform) and the provincial control line changing from the first batch of undergraduate 411 points to the undergraduate batch 405 points, the ranking system underwent structural changes, with the 2025 baseline being about 6239. In 2021, only data for the ethnic experimental class (ranking 2) was available, which is not comparable; the university's enrollment plan in Qinghai for liberal arts/history category: 30 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 28 in 2024, 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 35, an increase of 3 (+9.375%) compared to 2025, a relatively significant expansion, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science ranking has continuously risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, a significant improvement, enhancing the overall attractiveness of the school; the school's reputation is stable, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 80th (rated "average"), with low attention; no records of the school in abnormal filing data, no signs of gaps or sharp drops; Ethnology A+ (top nationally, directly corresponding to the ethnology major in history category admissions), Sociology A-, Chinese Language and Literature A- (corresponding to the Chinese language and literature major), advantageous disciplines highly match liberal arts admission majors, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (slightly hot), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended) and other popular liberal arts majors have high social popularity; Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged) has low popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Qinghai is about 48,000, with an estimated history category of about 17,300 based on recent proportions, slightly higher than 17,212 in 2025; the provincial control line for the 2025 history category undergraduate batch is 405 points, and for the 2024 liberal arts first batch undergraduate is 411 points, basically stable. The school is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional attraction for Qinghai candidates; the number of admissions in Qinghai is small (about 30), making it a small-scale enrollment province, and rankings are susceptible to fluctuations in applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6239, the 2026 expansion of 3 students (+9.375%) exerting downward pressure on rankings, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing school attractiveness, advantageous disciplines (Ethnology A+, etc.) strongly attracting liberal arts candidates, and a slight increase in the total number of history category candidates in Qinghai, it is expected that the 2026 history category ranking will balance the expansion effect and the increase in school attractiveness, with a slight backward shift compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6560, with a range of 6060–7060.
